actions.leaf_title: Add list-units CLI subcommand with domain grouping

revised.title: Restructure list-units wiring into a self-contained subcommand module
revised.content:
The failure shows the subcommand tangled in the router; extract it into its own module with a narrow registration hook so the change stays small.

Files: unitconv/cli/list_units.py, unitconv/cli/router.py, tests/test_list_units.py

Acceptance criteria:
- list-units works via the extracted module (existing assertions green)
- router diff limited to the one registration hook

Test expectations: existing list-units tests keep passing; registration hook has a test

actions.rationale: Under-cap failure; revised spec stays inside the strict LeafSpec vocabulary.
